sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE THGQMGPRIO ( CODPRIO INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGPRIO PRIMARY KEY (CODPRIO) )
sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE THGQMGPRIO ( CODPRIO NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGPRIO PRIMARY KEY (CODPRIO) )

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DESCRICAO na tabela THGQMGPRIO
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGPRIO ADD DESCRICAO VARCHAR(50)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo PRAZODIAS na tabela THGQMGPRIO
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGPRIO ADD PRAZODIAS INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo ATIVO na tabela THGQMGPRIO
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGPRIO ADD ATIVO CHAR(1)
